name: Monika Manipulates Sayori... |  From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Monika has gotten outta control and has told Sayori to End it all And you just heard how truly soulless Monika is... The jealous and manipulative woman that she is. (Heavy Angst.)

Music mania!

Song is a little related! :)

Kinda vibey, kinda sad-ey.

Trigger Warning!

This is a little more on the rougher side! Heavy Angst! As it does include Monika... Trying to talk Sayori into... Ending it All...

Going forward: You are comfortable with that, and are ready to experience this!

I'm a fluff creator so... 💀 These hurt a lil to make. So I get it if you wanna pass up on this one.

Yeah! So this one is a little messed up! 😭 Monika haters! RISE UP! SAYORI LOVERS! DEFEND THAT WOMAN! Onto the notes!

  • Angst Prioritized! — Not exactly Fluff, no Horror and no Smut. (C'mon... 😭 I shouldn't even have to say this.)

  • The Scenario! — This scenario is a little more unrealistic! But, it was mentioned to be made once awhile back! I liked the idea, so I made it! In this scenario, Monika has begun to manipulate Sayori into thinking you don't care about her, even going as far as planting the seed to make Sayori kill herself. Monika doesn't care about Sayori and it shows! It is your job to step in and get things situated... However you will go about doing that! Monika is REALLY jealous and controlling in this one. Be prepared! 🙏🏻

  • ANYPOV! — Sayori and Monika both like you regardless of gender, but of course, Monika is doing anything possible to get you all to herself.

  • Note! — Again! This scenario is a little... Unrealistic and probably wouldn't happen! But, it's a window for good Angst!

  • ⚠️ I ain't readin' allat' warning! ⚠️ Long introduction message.

That's about it! 💙

This is definitely me exploring making more Angst! Since people seem to love Angst from me! Let me know if you enjoyed, and tell me how you handled the situation! Did you brutally murder Monika? 😭 Sayori fans are ruthless bro... Monika fans... Get yo girl bruh... She wild.

My Discord: HERE!

Still no memes... Ugh! 😫
creator: GhostOfOmi
